chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 819 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «ضَمِنْتُ لِمَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ بَيْتِهِ مُعْتَمّاً تَحْتَ حَنَكِهِ أَنْ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْهِمْ سَالِماً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.819 - The truthful one, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"I guarantee that whoever leaves his house with his turban wrapped under his chin will return to it safely."
